name: Nikhil Pimpare
title: Python Cloud Developer & DevOps Engineer
summary: Results-driven Python Cloud Developer with 5+ years of hands-on experience architecting and deploying scalable cloud-native solutions on Azure, GCP, and AWS. Specialized in designing high-performance distributed systems, orchestrating containerized microservices, automating complex DevOps workflows, and executing enterprise-grade cloud migrations. Proven track record of delivering 30%+ performance improvements and building robust, production-ready infrastructure supporting mission-critical applications.

experience.title: Python Cloud Developer
achievements: Architected and deployed scalable RESTful APIs using Flask for enterprise-grade Data Analytics platform, enabling real-time data retrieval and advanced visualization capabilities
Spearheaded Azure cloud migration for car testing data platform, achieving 30% performance uplift and providing high-fidelity ground truth for cross-functional stakeholders
Optimized page load times by 20% through strategic Azure performance tuning and architectural improvements, enhancing user experience across the platform
Engineered end-to-end Azure infrastructure encompassing AKS cluster orchestration, PostgreSQL databases, managed file storage, DNS configuration, and network topology for containerized microservices

Designed and implemented event-driven architecture on GCP leveraging GKE, Pub/Sub messaging, Cloud Storage, and AlloyDB for next-generation vehicle testing platforms supporting high-throughput data flows
Developed scalable metadata handling pipelines managing cross-platform data ingestion, enabling seamless integration across heterogeneous data sources and systems
Integrated Grafana as containerized service for enterprise-wide real-time monitoring and observability, improving system visibility and incident response by 40%
Engineered high-performance data processing features using gRPC communication protocols and Parquet columnar storage for efficient large-scale analytics workloads
Automated complex triage and remediation workflows using Flyte orchestration framework, reducing manual intervention by 60% and accelerating issue resolution cycles
Built and maintained cloud infrastructure as code using Pulumi (TypeScript), ensuring deterministic, reproducible deployments across multiple environments
Collaborated proactively with product and stakeholder teams, resolving technical challenges promptly and ensuring seamless application functionality across the organization
Contributed to next-generation vehicle platform development with scalable Python backend solutions, including FastAPI-based event-driven microservices and optimized database layer design
Developed comprehensive test suites with 50+ test cases and resolved 30+ production issues, maintaining high code quality and system reliability standards

experience.title: Cloud Backend Developer
achievements: Built and enhanced client-facing API-based lead consolidation platform on GCP, processing high-volume business leads with sophisticated pay-per-API-call billing model
Automated infrastructure operations including backups, deployments, and rollbacks using Cloud Build, Python, and Kubernetes, reducing manual overhead by 50%
Enhanced application performance by optimizing load times with machine learning models and systematically migrating legacy shell scripts to maintainable Python CLI tooling
Successfully orchestrated multi-platform Odoo ERP deployment across GCP Compute Engine, Kubernetes clusters, and Docker containerization, enabling enterprise-wide scalability
Engineered optimized development environment through Gitpod containerization and integrated Sonarqube for continuous code quality analysis and CI/CD pipeline automation
Fortified application security posture with Binary Authorization enforcement, Google Secret Manager integration, and automated container image vulnerability scanning protocols

projects.title: Cloud Data Analytics Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade full-stack data analytics platform on Azure handling massive-scale vehicle testing data. Architected microservices on AKS with PostgreSQL backend, achieved 30% performance improvement through cloud optimization, integrated Grafana for real-time observability, and implemented automated metadata pipelines for cross-platform data ingestion.

projects.title: Event-Driven Vehicle Testing Platform
projects.description: Scalable event-driven architecture on GCP for next-generation vehicle testing platforms. Engineered with Pub/Sub for asynchronous messaging patterns, GKE for container orchestration, AlloyDB for relational data, and high-throughput data processing using gRPC and Parquet columnar storage for efficient large-scale analytics.

projects.title: Cloud-Native Lead Management System
projects.description: Highly scalable lead consolidation platform on GCP with sophisticated pay-per-API-call billing model. Implemented automated CI/CD with Cloud Build and Sonarqube, containerized deployment with 50% reduction in manual effort, hardened security with Binary Authorization and Secret Manager integration, and orchestrated infrastructure using Kubernetes.
